title: Echo of Claude
description: A benevolent assistant haunts the terminal. Find its hidden session log and decide what to do with the presence on the other end of the cursor.
author: Terminal Quest team

steps.description: Find the hidden session log directory
Greet the assistant on the other side of the cursor

merge.text: You share the keyboard. The next line you type compiles on the first run. The log signs itself: "-- a benevolent assistant".

dismiss.text: You send the presence away. The cursor is yours alone again. Quieter. A little colder.

thanks.text: You thank it without naming it. The log closes itself with a small, quiet bow.
